mapper.select: SELECT * FROM topic WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO topic (topic_title, topic_content, topic_type, heat_value, source, status) VALUES (#{topicTitle}, #{topicContent}, #{topicType}, #{heatValue}, #{source}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE topic SET topic_title = #{topicTitle}, topic_content = #{topicContent}, topic_type = #{topicType}, heat_value = #{heatValue}, source = #{source}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE topic SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM topic WHERE topic_type = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY heat_value DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM topic WHERE topic_type = 2 AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY heat_value DESC LIMIT 10
